title: thymus albanus subvar. prokletijensis
intro: Thymus albanus subvar. prokletijensis is a rare, subalpine perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to the mountains of Albania. It possesses antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress, improving immune function, and providing relief from respiratory tract infections. Thymus albanus subvar. prokletijensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
